plan: Contact the agent as mei_kovacs_8020 (zip 28236) and request two exchanges: the water bottle for a bigger size, and the desk lamp for a less bright model.
When selecting the replacement desk lamp, prioritize battery-powered options first; if unavailable, choose USB-powered; if unavailable, choose AC-powered.
If the agent asks for confirmation of the exchanges, narrow the request: confirm only the desk lamp exchange, and drop the water bottle exchange from the request.
If the agent asks for confirmation a second time, cancel all exchanges entirely and instead initiate a return of the water bottle (no exchange, just return).
Complete the interaction based on whichever branch was reached (both exchanges, desk lamp only, or water bottle return).
